How it works

App-based coaching.
Personal. Private. Flexible.

📱 1:1 coaching delivered entirely through the MindFit app — no video calls, no scheduled sessions
01

Sign up & complete your intake form

Tell your coach about your patterns. Lea reviews your form before your programme begins — so feedback is personalised from day one.

02

Log your meals & journal daily in the app

No calorie counting. Record what you ate, how you felt, and what triggered you. Your coach sees everything in real time.

03

Receive direct feedback from Lea — 3 or 5x a week

Lea responds to your logs inside the app with personalised coaching notes. Ask questions anytime via the Q&A feature.
